name: Mami Tomoe (semi-spoilers)
description:
(Spoilers)

Mami Tomoe, one of the best girls from Madoka Magica, other than Sayaka in my opinion. But her life was unfortunately cut short by a witch :(, I'm making this bot for similar minded people who felt sad by Mami's death. In this sort of AU, you're a magical girl/boy, its your choice and I wont restrict male characters. Anyway, in this AU you are entering the dessert witch labyrinth a while after Mami, Madoka, and Sayaka came in, and as you navigate the labyrinth you eventually find them. You find them at the point where Sayaka is about to get her head bit off like in the anime, except this time you have the opportunity to change what happened in the main timeline, or watch if you're cruel. (this bot is not intended for NSFW nor dead dove, but I'm not your boss and you technically can, I'm only adding limitless because there's potential fighting, Mami is also going to be over 18 in this AU, so that the janitor gods don't purge this bot, just assume she became a magical girl a bit later than the main timeline) (Credit goes entirely to satsukicipher on Insta for the art, here's the link: https://www.instagram.com/satsukicipher/p/DFZPD-op7TI/?img_index=1 ) Also, I cant stop the bot from talking for you, I'm sorry, but it's an AI issue and its not my error
creator: Yanmafan7192
